reasoning: The user asked for cherry blossom (sakura) viewing spots across Tohoku (not Tokyo), but the tool was called only for Akita prefecture. improvement_hint: Call get_spots for all six Tohoku prefectures (Aomori, Iwate, Miyagi, Yamagata, Fukushima, Akita) filtered by kind=sakura_meisho or similar, then merge and rank by prominence. Also respect the query language (Spanish) in any metadata or description fields returned.

reasoning: The user asked specifically for major sake breweries in Niigata. improvement_hint: Apply multi-prefecture fan-out across all Sea of Japan coast prefectures (Niigata, Akita, Yamagata, Ishikawa, Toyama, Fukui, Tottori, Shimane) and filter by season=summer and keyword=花火 to return only fireworks festivals. A region-level query with event_type or keyword filter would dramatically improve relevance.
